---
title: "Multi-Stage Knowledge-Distilled VGAE and GAT for Robust Controller-Area-Network Intrusion Detection"
date: 2025-06-01
description: "A multi-stage intrusion detection system combining variational graph autoencoders and graph attention networks with knowledge distillation for CAN bus security."
categories: [intrusion-detection, graph-neural-networks, knowledge-distillation]
---

**Venue:** Preprint

**Authors:** R Frenken, SG Bhatti, H Zhang, Q Ahmed
